metadata.summary: KRXFetch is a core library for scraping financial data from the KRX(Korea Exchange) Market Data System.

documentation:
# KRXFetch

KRXFetch is a core library for scraping financial data from the KRX(Korea Exchange) Market Data System.

functions.name: krxfetch._holiday.holiday_from_file
documentation: Return holiday info from a local file.

functions.name: krxfetch._chrome._unified_platform
documentation:
platform part of user-agent

macOS:   'Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7'
windows: 'Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64'
linux:   'X11; Linux x86_64'

https://chromium.googlesource.com/chromium/src.git/+/refs/heads/main/content/common/user_agent.cc

functions.name: krxfetch._chrome.user_agent
documentation: Return the user-agent of Chrome Browser

functions.name: krxfetch.calendar.now
documentation: Return the current korean date and time.

functions.name: krxfetch.calendar.is_weekend
documentation: Return whether it is weekend or not.

functions.name: krxfetch.calendar.is_holiday
documentation: Return whether it is holiday or not.

functions.name: krxfetch.calendar.is_closing_day
documentation: Return whether it is a closing day or not.

functions.name: krxfetch.calendar.is_trading_day
documentation: Return whether it is a trading day or not.
